scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,convex,worker --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace @relay/web" "convex dev" "npm run dev --workspace @relay/worker"
scripts.dev:loop: npm run build:packages && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,convex,loop --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace @relay/web" "convex dev" "node scripts/start-local-component-loop-worker.mjs"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @relay/component-sdk && npm run build --workspace @relay/component-testkit && npm run build --workspace @relay/reference-components && npm run build --workspace @relay/rendering
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @relay/worker && npm run build --workspace @relay/web
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
